name: caveconverter
title: caveconverter
description:
Cave survey data format converter
Software to convert between various survey data formats. Formats
currently supported are:
formats written: Toporobot, Survex, Compass
formats read: Survex, Pockettopo text file, dxf (polylines and lines)
This version is a command-line utility.

commands.name: caveconverter
commands.description: convert cave survey data between formats

arguments.description: caveconverter can regenerate survey data files from DXF files generated from Survex .3d
arguments.raw: -up  caveconverter can regenerate survey data files from DXF files generated from Survex .3d

command_examples: caveconverter infile outfile in_format out_format [ lrud ]
caveconverter pdaexport.txt survexfile.svx p s lrud
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use caveconverter because Cave survey data format converter.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use caveconverter as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `caveconverter infile outfile in_format out_format [ lrud ]` as documented upstream for caveconverter.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `caveconverter survexfile.svx output.text s t` as documented upstream for caveconverter.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `caveconverter pdaexport.txt survexfile.svx p s lrud` as documented upstream for caveconverter.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `caveconverter datafile.dxf toporobotfileout.text d t` as documented upstream for caveconverter.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair caveconverter with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `caveconverter --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

arguments.name: -up
arguments.description: caveconverter can regenerate survey data files from DXF files generated from Survex .3d

examples: caveconverter infile outfile in_format out_format [ lrud ]
caveconverter pdaexport.txt survexfile.svx p s lrud
documentation.readme: caveconverter - convert cave survey data between formats
documentation.how_to_use: Install/setup: sudo apt install caveconverter. Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `caveconverter survexfile.svx output.text s t`. Further invocations from upstream: `caveconverter pdaexport.txt survexfile.svx p s lrud`; `caveconverter datafile.dxf toporobotfileout.text d t`.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'install' phase against surfaces [local] in the Kali Linux category. Fits when the engagement needs: Cave survey data format converter.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: caveconverter - convert cave survey data between formats.
usage_sections: Install with: sudo apt install caveconverter
Install with: sudo apt install caveconverter
